user.title: Connect to LLM API
user.description: Configure the API connection for your LLM endpoint.

data_description.api_type: Select the API protocol to use
data_description.api_url: The base URL of your LLM API endpoint
data_description.custom_headers: Optional custom HTTP headers as a JSON object

pick_model.title: Select Model
pick_model.description: Connection successful! Choose a model for your default conversation agent.

data_description.model: The model to use for inference

data_description.api_type: Select the API protocol to use
data_description.api_url: The base URL of your LLM API endpoint
data_description.custom_headers: Optional custom HTTP headers as a JSON object

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the API endpoint. Please check the URL.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.

abort.already_configured: This API endpoint is already configured.

user.title: Configure Conversation Agent
user.description: Set up a new conversation agent with your preferred model and settings.

data_description.prompt_preset: Select a pre-built prompt or choose Custom to write your own
data_description.model: The model name to use for inference
data_description.prompt: System prompt that defines the assistant's behavior
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the response
data_description.llm_hass_api: Allow the AI to interact with and control Home Assistant
data_description.max_context_tokens: Maximum context window size in tokens (0 = unlimited)
data_description.stop_sequences: Comma-separated list of sequences that stop generation
data_description.max_retries: Maximum number of retry attempts on failure
data_description.fallback_model: Model to use if the primary model fails
data_description.voice_mode: Optimize responses for voice output (shorter, no formatting)
data_description.memory_max_messages: Maximum number of messages to remember
data_description.custom_tools: Custom tool definitions as JSON array (see documentation)
data_description.extra_model_params: JSON object of extra API parameters that override UI settings above (e.g. top_k, repetition_penalty)
data_description.json_schema: JSON schema for structured output (required when Response Format is JSON Schema)
data_description.extended_thinking: Enable extended thinking for deeper reasoning
data_description.thinking_budget: Maximum tokens for the thinking process
